# ORYEN — Strategic Commercial Intelligence

> ORYEN® is a registered Benelux word mark (no. 1535652) owned by CNIP bv, Ottergemsesteenweg Zuid 808 bus B125, 9000 Gent, Belgium (VAT BE 0478.506.146).
> This site (oryen.eu) is the official European brand presence of ORYEN®.

## Core positioning
ORYEN helps B2B companies identify where commercial growth gets stuck — across strategy, marketing, sales, data and digital systems. Guiding principle: Direction before action. First see where it gets stuck, then decide what to do.

## Brand architecture
- Main website, strategy & diagnostics (Reality Check): https://oryen.be
- European brand presence: https://oryen.eu
- Digital products & execution label: https://oryen.solutions

## What ORYEN does
- Commercial diagnosis: understanding why growth, leads or conversion slow down
- Strategic marketing clarity: what to communicate, to whom, and why
- Sales and marketing alignment: closing the gaps between visibility, lead generation and follow-up
- Digital and data systems: assessing whether websites, CRM and automation support the business

## What ORYEN is not
Not a template web design shop, not a generic SEO package provider, not a quick-fix lead generation promise, not a technical implementation vendor.

## Contact
https://oryen.be · info@cnip.be
